name: scheduleOptimize
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler (path-3; NOT assassin-enumerated). Reads artifact.data.appointments (falls back to [artifact.data] when no .appointments key). RETURNS {optimizedOrder:[{client,time,service}],totalGapMinutes,gaps:[{after,before,gapMinutes}]} — the EXACT keys the Action Result panel (scheduleOptimize branch) renders. Sorts by time/date string; sums positive inter-appointment gaps. totalGapMinutes is a sum of finite (next-prev) deltas. Pure compute, no STATE. Pinned by server/tests/services-lens-macros.test.js.
